case_title: MOSHER MANAGEMENT COMPANY, INC. VS. ARMAX, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ARMAX, INC.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MOSHER MANAGEMENT COMPANY, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSHER MANAGEMENT COMPANY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARMAX, INC. $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $333.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,158.00, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE; AS TO DEFENDANT ARMAX, INC.
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-15-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218

NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT PLTF ASSIGNS AND TRANSFER TO MERLE HORN, BONNIE PRESTON, NATHAN MATZGER TRUST, STEVEN SPINRAD, DOROTHY STEM, MARTIN SEGOL, ADRIENNA SEGOL, MYRNA ROGHBERT, GARY RUBIN, KATIE STERN, ANDREW STERN, AND JUDY STEM THE JUDGMENT HEREIN GIVEN/MADE/ENTERED ON NOV. 6, 2002; AMENDED JUDGMENT HEREIN GIVEN/MADE/ENTERED ON APRIL 15, 2003. SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSHER MANAGEMENT COMPANY, INC. ON DEFENDANT ARMAX, INC.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT ARMAX, INC.

calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 15, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan. Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Lawrence L. Curtice, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Mosher Management Company. Also present, Neil Mosher, the mother. Court hears evidence on Petition for an Amended Judgment and good cuase appearing the Court grants judgment as follows: $25,000.00, Fees: $2,825.00, Costs: $333.00 for a total amended judgment of $28,158.00. Judgment signed in open court.
